items.text: Taurus rising , venus in pisces 11th house , saturn in aries 12th house , north node leo in 5th house. Lost my step father of 22 years and lost my real father who never was in my life. Cant keep a job due to moving from being a military spouse. And ive been dealing with huge health issues,
Taurus rising, aries venus 11h, north node Cap in 8h and Saturn Aquarius in 10h. Dreams: be free frm my previous relationship, get divorced, to travel, to live a comfortable life when i get older
NN 11th Pisces, Venus Aries 12th, Saturn 9th Capricorn

NN in Taurus 1st h, Venus Leo 4th h, Saturn in Cancer 3rd h. My dream is to honestly be stupidly successful in the creative field, having enough money to spoil my children. I honestly feel like I haven’t been through it that much except for early on in my life with familial difficulties(dad left when I was born), moving from Asia to Canada, SA. But now I feel like I’m chilling, I honestly feel like recently anything I’ve verbally manifest has come to me pretty easily.

Taurus rising, venus 5th house virgo, north node capricorn 9h, saturn 10h aquarius. Lost the love of my life. Need constant change (learning new cultures and new stuff) mostly from traveling and a beautiful (not too big house) with big yard for all my animals. Someone to do my house work 🤣 I dream of going everywhere and learning everything. i attract hard on the outside crazy emotional on the inside people who hide a lot from me.
I have Venus in 10h, never had a single job past 12y? Nn in 7h didn’t have a long term relationship past 6 years, my Saturn in 11h so you can imagine

I honestly haven't had anything extreme like that happening lately just environment and mental changes. 3 years ago was more when I had those situations and death. I have Venus in my 4th house and recently my mother I haven't spoken to in a year and half has shown up at my place of work. kinda did either predict or manifest that one with Jupiter entering Leo the other week. my NN is in Taurus and I definitely dream of having my own home and moving freely in it and making it as comfy as I can for myself and my partner and cats

Venus in Taurus ASC, North Node in Gemini, Saturn in Scorpio. Always had issues with keeping a job, currently battling against loneliness because I literally have nobody in life (dead parents and estranged relatives). My dream would be a having some sort of rescue farm for abandoned animals and I tend to attract confused, troubled and wounded people.
Taurus rising, Venus Capricorn 10th house, NN Gemini 1st house, Gemini Saturn 2nd house #watdatmean

@Veronica ✨✨✨: @Veronica ✨✨✨: Venus in Sag and the eighth house, NN Capricorn ninth house, Saturn, Gemini in second. Also, to always live any beautiful, comfortable home and have a life full of true love and good connection.
Venus in the 11th Pisces at 22 degrees 😅 north node in Aries with my sun, mercury and Jupiter in the 12th. Saturn in sag in the 8th. Death and rebirth is my whole life’s story

Taurus rising, Venus 5th house, north node in cancer, Saturn in Gemini. My dream is to create art and just express my creativity. I’ve also lost 5 people In my life already and I’m only 24. I grew up without my father because he passed so very unstable emotionally as a child. So grew up waiting for the ball to drop when things got good. I just want stability and consistency 🥲 I feel like I attract lessons about loss in order to grow and become stronger but I’m TIRED. Like we’ve played these games before 😩
Venus 2nd house, North node 6th house, Saturn 11 house. I dream to be loved n spoiled. But always got betrayed and envy and diminished

Taurus rising, Venus & Saturn 8H, NN 12H. Primary caretaker of parent during cancer, lost parent early. Lifelong autoimmune disease, extreme difficulty finding treatment that will work. Difficulty doing job but luckily employed (exhausted). My only dream is to feel okay in my body again, and to be able to rest and be domestic/in a garden.

capricorn venus (8h), aries nn (11h), leo saturn (3h). i’ve been dreaming about moving abroad, to live my life to the fullest without having to worry about income, and to bring an upgrade to my parents’ living conditions. mostly, i’ve been wanting to move very very far away from my hometown

venus in the 1st Nn in scorpio 7th saturn in 11th
Good fullfulling career do what ever I want have the best of everything
lessons: boundaries with everything and everyone
Aries Venus 12th house, Taurus rising, Saturn in Gemini 2nd house, I want stability a comfortable peaceful life. I want abundance protection, health and generational wealth.

Taurus rising 1st house, leo saturn in the 4th house and sag venus in 8th house, nn in aries 12th house. I love teaching people what i know and i love reading people i just wanna gain sm knowledge and learn yet i sit and do nothing
Taurus rising here🙋🏾‍♀️. Venus is in 9th house in Capricorn, north node in 4th house In Leo, Saturn is in 6th house in Libra. I dream of traveling the world and living on a tropical island.

Taurus rising, Venus in Taurus 1H, north node in Libra, Saturn in Pisces in the 11H. It’s exactly what it sounds like too lol. my dream is to have a safe, comfortable home, the privilege of enjoying my work, a community of like minded people, the company of a compassionate lover and money left over once my bills are paid lol. I’m experiencing the complete opposite.

taurus rising, venus in aquarius (10h), nn in leo in retrograde (3h), saturn in taurus (12h). I had a breakup, got laid off twice (still trying to find a job), having health issues as well. My dream is to honestly be financially free so I can do whatever I want whenever I want like traveling or affording certain things. I feel like I attract a lot of mental lessons, lessons around relationships/friendships, & money.
Pisces Sun 11th house NN in Pisces 11th house Taurus rising/ascendant Venus in Taurus 12th house Saturn in Capricorn 8th house I’ve been thru it all
Been going through it since my Saturn return💀
Venus in Pisces 11th, NN in sag 8th house, Saturn in Aquarius in 10th with my mercury and sun up there, I’m tired man. And my dreams are just to be comfortable and not be burnt the fuck out on jobs.

Venus in Libra in the 6th, NN Aquarius in the 10th, Saturn in Gemini in the 2nd. - Uranus was rough - it makes me nervous that it is in my 2nd house, but I am also nervous about Chiron in my first. I love my career already. I am a K/1 art teacher and professionally I am
i’d be willing to give my experience i’ll give you a private dm

Taurus Rising; 26°Gemini Venus in 2H + 29°Aquarius NN in 10H + 12°Capricorn SaturnRx in 8H; job stability issues since I was 15/16 years old I’m now 37. I don’t eat more than once or twice a day most days. Lately it’s increased to at least twice a day. Was homeless off and on since 18 years old. Romantic relationships pretty much nonexistent and I don’t put up with a lot I have a low tolerance and see that I’d have to overlook so much and be mistreated to be in one so far and I’m not for that. No family relationships or connections. No friendships. My dreams have been to be able to afford whatever I want, be a humanitarian/philanthropist, be successful in the Music & Entertainment Industry, have a Fashion Line, Have a bunch of children and homeschool them, be married to the love of my life, have a great body, great skin and looks, have and leave a legacy, make loads of money easily be and actress and judge. I attract obsessive people, people who need healing, people who are less competent, job/financial opportunities, nice housing usually, women and men that are pansexual, ppl who don’t realize they are narcissistic, people who want a change, people who need saving, emotional/sensitive people, people who want to do things for me, soft dominant women, talkative people, spiritual people, and tarot card readers.

Taurus rising and Ive attracted jealousy, evil people and people whom i thought loved me but crushed me later.
yes I have lost a job, people, relationship, by all betrayal. All of you said was the thing I experienced in the past. My dream is just to be rich and have peace in my life.

taurus rising: Venus in Scorpio, North node in libra, Saturn in Pisces. If only i have everything, ill travel more, go shopping and spoil myself to the max. But right now i have nothing, I don't even have a stable job. I don't like dating also. Im NBSB.

Hi! Taurus rising (1H), Virgo Venus (5H), Libra North Node (6H), & Aries Saturn (12H). My dreams are vivid and intuitive. Always in the conscious and unconscious at the same time. For desires, as soon to be first time mom who has been unemployed since October due to massive company bs, all I want is to pursue my creative passions part time while enjoying motherhood. I attract people who are going through big transformations & transitions in life!

Taurus rising, 5th house Venus (4th in whole sign, but I’m a Placidus girlie), 2nd house NN, 6th house Saturn (7th whole sign) conjunct Moon and Pluto. I want love, joy, creativity, and learning a lot about self worth

Pisces venus 11th house, NN Gemini 2nd house Retrograde, Saturn Gemini 1st house. I guess my only dream is to live a good life with my soulmate when I find him 😂 the kind that no external obstacles will matter and we will always stick by each other and get through it. Simply a fairytale romance. Of course helping my friends and family to live a good life too. About lessons idk tbh maybe that I should not be hiding my love for others, my aquarius stellium works hard for me to be nonchalant even though internally my pisces moon feels everything 😅

Taurus rising, but also a Taurus stellium in 12th house. Venus in Gemini 1st house, Saturn in Pisces 11th house and NN in Scorpio 7th house. I grew up pretty much extremely isolated not by choice (for decades) micromanaged, controlled and living my whole life solely on what my family approves. I don’t even know who I am anymore or what I want in life. My biggest dream right now is to break free from my family, travel the world, meet people and find myself, which my family heavily disapproves of. I have a plan and it’ll take time, emotional resilience and patience and some hope. Keeping my fingers crossed. Wish me luck. 🥺
loosing people to death

Capricorn - Venus 9H, NN Virgo 5H, Saturn - Aries 12H. My dreams include living somewhere abroad. I don't dream of children, I would love a partner later in life. My dream is for the people around me to live authentically. Career-wise I would love to stay in my current field (fintech) & grow with it. Eventually becoming a professor (thinking maybe in my 50's).

taurus rising - venus in leo 4h, NN in leo 3h, saturn in taurus 12h hmmm dreams? i think i just want a stable life where i don't really have to worry abt money everyday hmm not like a millionaire level but at least comfortable. a comfortable home. and i just wanna do what i want like my passion, i love customer service so i think id love to travel around the world while serving the people. that's aviation.

Taurus rising. Venus in Pisces in the 11th house, north node in Gemini in the 2nd house, and Saturn in Scorpio in the 7th house. Last few years have been pretty bad…and last few months have been worse. My dad died unexpectedly a few years ago (2023), and then my husband emotionally cheated on me shortly after. Then, just about a month ago, found out my husband had been cheating on me with my half sister (who seduced him, which doesn’t at all excuse what he did, but hurt twice as much, because she’s my sister, that I’ve known my whole life) for months, and then my mom died unexpectedly almost 2 weeks ago. I am finally getting closer to achieving my dream though, which is to have enough land to grow a food forest, and teach people about native plants and foraging. I finally got the land, and have started working on the food forest! Lessons I’ve attracted are to 1) trust my intuition, 2) don’t trust words, trust actions and patterns, 3) I’m stronger than I ever thought possible. Luckily, things always end up working out for me in the end; I’m divinely protected, and the universe always provides…eventually.

Venus in Virgo 5th house, North Node in Capricorn 9th house, Saturn in Aquarius in 10th house. I want to own a creative studio and live my life like Winnie the Pooh. I attract a lot of young souls and young egos. I have been called walking moldavite (also autistic) :)
Venus scorp, north node scorp, saturn pisces
Taurus rising. Dad passed away last week. Venus in libra 6th house. North Node Taurus 1st house. Saturn in Cancer 3rd house.

Taurus rising, NN Aquarius in 10th house, Venus Aquarius in 10th house, and Saturn Taurus 1st house. My dream is to find a career that is fulfilling emotionally and provides enough financial freedom for me to do what I like. No kids. Not sure what I attract atm

Taurus rising - my boyfriend of 10 years does by suicide last year. Aaaaaand my sister is going thru chemo. Venus in Cancer, Saturn in Taurus (1H), Chiron in Aries (12H). I don’t look to the future much right now

Tsurus rising Capricorn Venus ik the 8th house, Leo north node in 4th house and 12th house Saturn in Taurus. My taurus is split between my 12 and 1st house. I just want try be able to live happily and be with someone who understands me. I also wanted to be someone that tries to make a change in the world or community. I feel like I attract people who tend to try and control me and keep me secluded from the people I’m closest to in life and that demand to have my full attention. I also feel like I attract responsibilities not a bad thing but tends to be I end up being the one having to try an fix everything or keep things together
Taurus rising, Venus in sag 8h, Taurus NN 12h and Saturn in sag 7h
venus in the 5th, NN in the 6th, saturn in the 11th. dream is recognition for the art i absolutely dont share, attract intense emotional experiences

I don’t want to air too much of my laundry out but just wanted to let you know you were so on point about the food pantry. 🤣 Just had to go for the first time in absolute tears and had an anxiety attack. For the first time in my life I was desperate. Been eating beans out of cans for meals. I know this too shall pass. I just need to try harder. 😩 Venus Taurus (ASC) 1H NN Pisces 12H. Saturn Capricorn 9H

Taurus rising with a Gemini moon in the 1st. Venus in the 8th Capricorn, so I’ve never had a conventional job. Saturn in the 7th in sag, so my relationships have been horrible and my NN in the 11th which is my Aries mars.

Aquarius Venus (10), Capricorn NN (9), Aries Saturn. Dreams: being able to express myself in all the ways I desire while having a beautiful home and financially abundant. I’ve been having horrible health issues, I think I’m learning to take care of myself before putting others first
